items.title: Cloudflare Introduces Temporary Accounts for Autonomous Worker Deployment
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Introduces Temporary Accounts for Autonomous Worker Deployment. Cloudflare has recently introduced temporary accounts that let AI agents deploy Cloudflare Workers immediately, without first creating or authenticating with a perma

items.title: Slack Introduces Agent Driven End-to-End Testing to Improve Resilience in UI Test Automation
items.summaryShort: Slack Introduces Agent Driven End-to-End Testing to Improve Resilience in UI Test Automation. Agentic testing is an AI-driven approach to end-to-end test automation introduced by Slack engineering.

items.title: Presentation: Chaos Engineering GPU Clusters
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Chaos Engineering GPU Clusters. Bryan Oliver discusses the frontier of AI infrastructure: chaos engineering for large-scale GPU clusters.

items.title: Linux Foundation Launches Akrites to Protect Critical Open Source Software from AI-Powered Threats
items.summaryShort: Linux Foundation Launches Akrites to Protect Critical Open Source Software from AI-Powered Threats. The Linux Foundation has launched Akrites, a new industry-wide initiative aimed at defending the world's most critical open source software

items.title: GitHub Copilot CLI Gets Tabs and No-Config-File Tool Setup in Redesigned Terminal UI
items.summaryShort: GitHub Copilot CLI Gets Tabs and No-Config-File Tool Setup in Redesigned Terminal UI. GitHub has made the redesigned GitHub Copilot CLI terminal interface generally available.

items.title: Reed Jobs would rather talk about curing cancer than his last name
items.summaryShort: Reed Jobs would rather talk about curing cancer than his last name. When we last sat down with Jobs at TechCrunch Disrupt nearly three years ago, his firm Yosemite was brand new and biotech was still reeling from its post-pandemic crash.

items.title: This slushie machine was a lifesaver during NYC's heat wave
items.summaryShort: This slushie machine was a lifesaver during NYC's heat wave. Last weekend's brutal NYC heat wave had me craving a frozen drink almost every afternoon.
